title: MaceExtension
description: As you see,a mace extension mod.
body:
- Why make it?


> I feel like the vanilla mace is toooooooo boring...so I made a mace extension mod.They have higher damage and attack speed that allows you to experience the fun of mace anytime.

- What it did？


> Six maces added,I also modified the wind charge recipe so that it can be synthesized with only eight feathers and one egg. This allows players to experience the fun of flying into the sky and giving mobs a heavy blow at any time.

_**Pay attention:**_

**(The mod is not perfect,because of studies and life，some items are also only available in creative.But,I will fix it in the future!Including but not limited to adding new items.)**

_Additionally, if you encounter recipe conflict issues, please add Polymorph._

![Added mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1070a4549a62e0f040ed741efeeae1d4c8dfe86c.png)

![Only creative](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e46f53f7bde35402cba11a35ffc8395b8eaf35.png)
